title: Australian Pecorino Bake
description: A delicious Australian-inspired dish made with gooey pecorino cheese and roasted ingredients.
instructions: Peel and chop the sweet potatoes into 1-inch pieces.
In a large bowl, toss the sweet potatoes with olive oil, salt, and pepper until they're evenly coated.
Spread the sweet potatoes on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
While the sweet potatoes are roasting, mix the crumbled pecorino cheese with minced roasted garlic.
Once the sweet potatoes are done, let them cool slightly.
In a large skillet, crack in the egg and scramble it until cooked through.
Add the scrambled egg to the skillet with the roasted sweet potatoes and toss to combine.
Transfer the sweet potato and egg mixture to a baking dish and top with the pecorino cheese mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with fresh rosemary and serve hot.
